$schema.title: JSON Schema URI
$schema.description: URI of the JSON Schema used to validate this record

hash.title: Schema Hash
hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the JSON Schema this record was validated against

type.title: GasID Schema Type
type.description: Discriminator value identifying this record as a GasID prevented-emissions certificate

version.title: Schema Version
version.description: Version of the schema, using semantic versioning

ipfs_uri.title: Schema IPFS URI
ipfs_uri.description: IPFS URI for this JSON Schema when the primary schema URI is unavailable

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: ISO 8601 creation timestamp for this record

external_id.title: External ID
external_id.description: UUID v4 identifier linking this IPFS record to its counterpart in the Carrot platform and other consuming systems

ipfs_uri.title: Viewer IPFS URI
ipfs_uri.description: IPFS URI of the metadata viewer dApp build

integrity_hash.title: Viewer Integrity Hash
integrity_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the published viewer bundle to verify integrity

viewer_reference.title: Metadata Viewer Reference
viewer_reference.description: References to the metadata viewer dApp, including immutable and latest entry points

blockchain_network.title: Blockchain Network
blockchain_network.description: Blockchain network where this record is deployed

deployment.title: Deployment Environment
deployment.description: System environment where this record was generated

data_set_name.title: Data Set Name
data_set_name.description: Name of the data set for this record

gas_type.title: Gas Type
gas_type.description: Greenhouse gas type whose emission was prevented through the waste management activity

credit_type.title: Credit Type
credit_type.description: Category of environmental credit — indicates the impact pathway (biowaste diversion or methane prevention)

credit_amount.title: Credit Amount
credit_amount.description: Number of environmental impact credits issued, purchased, or retired

prevented_co2e_kg.title: Prevented Emissions (CO₂e)
prevented_co2e_kg.description: CO₂e weight of the prevented emissions in kilograms (kg)

recycling_date.title: Recycling Date
recycling_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the recycling occurred (when the environmental gain was achieved)

issued_at.title: Issued At
issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the certificate was issued

summary.title: GasID Summary
summary.description: Key metrics for the GasID certificate including gas type, credit details, prevented emissions, and issuance timestamps

name.title: Methodology Name
name.description: Full official name of the methodology

external_url.title: Methodology External URL
external_url.description: URL to view the methodology on Carrot Explorer

ipfs_uri.title: Methodology IPFS URI
ipfs_uri.description: IPFS URI to the methodology record

completed_at.title: Audit Completion Timestamp
completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the audit was completed

external_url.title: Audit External URL
external_url.description: URL to view the audit on Carrot Explorer

rules_executed.title: Rules Executed
rules_executed.description: Number of rules executed during the audit

ipfs_uri.title: Audit Report
ipfs_uri.description: IPFS URI of the audit report

external_id.title: External ID
external_id.description: UUID v4 identifier linking this IPFS record to its counterpart in the Carrot platform and other consuming systems

ipfs_uri.title: IPFS URI
ipfs_uri.description: InterPlanetary File System URI pointing to distributed content

smart_contract_address.title: Smart Contract Address
smart_contract_address.description: Ethereum-compatible address of the smart contract that mints and manages this token

token_id.title: Token ID
token_id.description: Unique token identifier for this NFT within the smart contract

enum: EFB similar to Garden, Yard and Park Waste
subtype.title: Source Waste Subtype

weight_kg.title: Source Waste Net Weight
weight_kg.description: Net weight of the source waste in kilograms (kg)

id_hash.title: Location ID Hash
id_hash.description: SHA-256 hash anonymizing the real location identifier for privacy

city.title: City
city.description: Name of the Brazilian municipality where the activity takes place

subdivision_code.title: Country Subdivision Code
subdivision_code.description: State or region code following the ISO 3166-2 standard (e.g., BR-SP for São Paulo)

country_code.title: Country Code
country_code.description: Two-letter country code following ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 standard

responsible_participant_id_hash.title: Responsible Participant ID Hash
responsible_participant_id_hash.description: SHA-256 hash identifying the participant responsible for operations at this location

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: Geographic latitude coordinate in decimal degrees with maximum 1 decimal place precision (~11km accuracy for city-level)

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: Geographic longitude coordinate in decimal degrees with maximum 1 decimal place precision (~11km accuracy for city-level)

coordinates.title: Coordinates
coordinates.description: Approximate GPS coordinates of the site (city-level precision for privacy)

origin_location.title: Source Waste Origin Location
origin_location.description: Geographic location where the source waste was originally collected

formula.title: Calculation Formula
formula.description: Formula used to calculate the prevented emissions

method.title: Calculation Method
method.description: Method used to calculate the prevented emissions

calculated_at.title: Calculated At
calculated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the calculation was performed

reference.title: Calculation Reference
reference.description: Reference symbol used in the calculation formula

value.title: Calculation Value
value.description: Numeric value for this calculation parameter

label.title: Calculation Label
label.description: Human-readable label for this calculation value
examples: Prevented Emissions by Waste Subtype and Emissions Baseline Per Ton

items.title: Calculation Value
items.description: Named parameter or computed result used in the prevented emissions formula

values.title: Calculation Values
values.description: Input parameters and computed result used in the prevented emissions formula

prevented_emissions_calculation.title: Prevented Emissions Calculation
prevented_emissions_calculation.description: Methodology-based calculation of prevented CO₂e emissions, including formula, method, input values, and computation timestamp

data.title: GasID Data
data.description: Complete GasID certificate data including summary metrics, methodology reference, audit trail, source MassID, waste properties, origin location, and emissions calculation

audit_data_hash.title: Audit Data Hash
audit_data_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the original JSON content including private data before schema validation, used for data audit purposes

smart_contract_address.title: Smart Contract Address
smart_contract_address.description: Ethereum-compatible address of the smart contract that mints and manages this token

chain_id.title: Chain ID
chain_id.description: Blockchain network chain identifier (e.g., 137 for Polygon mainnet, 80002 for Amoy testnet)

network_name.title: Blockchain Network Name
network_name.description: Blockchain network name. Supported values include Polygon and Amoy

blockchain.title: Blockchain Information
blockchain.description: Blockchain deployment information including smart contract address, network, and token identifier

name.title: GasID Name
name.description: Full display name for this GasID NFT. Format: "GasID #[token_id] • [methodology] • [co2e]t CO₂e"

short_name.title: GasID Short Name
short_name.description: Compact name for UI summaries, tables, or tooltips. Format: "GasID #[token_id]"

description.title: Description
description.description: Human-readable summary describing the waste batch, origin, processing method, and chain of custody. Ideally, maximum 300 characters.
examples: This MassID represents 3 metric tons of organic food waste from Enlatados Produção, tracked through complete chain of custody from generation to composting.
This RecycledID represents 2.5 metric tons of recycled plastic bottles processed by Green Solutions Ltd.

image.title: Image URI
image.description: IPFS URI pointing to the NFT preview image displayed in marketplaces and wallets

background_color.title: Background Color
background_color.description: Hexadecimal color code used as background color in NFT marketplace displays

animation_url.title: Animation URL
animation_url.description: IPFS URI pointing to an animated or interactive media file for enhanced NFT display

external_links.title: External Links
external_links.description: Optional list of public resource links with labels

label.title: Link Label
label.description: Display name for the external link

url.title: Link URL
url.description: Direct URI to the linked resource

description.title: Link Description
description.description: Optional context about what the link provides

items.title: External Link
items.description: External link with label and description

value.description: Full official name of the methodology

display_type.description: How the trait should be displayed in marketplace UIs

max_value.description: Maximum possible value for numeric traits

attributes.title: GasID NFT Attribute Array
attributes.description:
Schema for the fixed set of GasID NFT attributes, enforcing order and type for each trait.

Required attributes (13, in order): Methodology, Gas Type, CO₂e Prevented (kg), Credit Amount, Credit Type, Source Waste Type, Source Weight (kg), Origin City, Origin Country Subdivision, MassID, MassID Recycling Date, Recycling Date, Certificate Issuance Date.

title: GasID NFT IPFS Record
description: Complete GasID NFT IPFS record including prevented emissions calculation, source waste provenance, methodology reference, and NFT display attributes
